Hub Home > training-and-knowledge > Meeting-to-Action Transformer

Meeting-to-Action Transformer

Transform meeting recordings, transcripts, or notes into structured action items with owners, deadlines, decisions made, questions raised, and a follow-up email draft. Eliminates the "what did we decide?" problem.

Beginner PASTE & GO Time-saving
Pro tip

Use Otter, Fireflies, or your video tool's built-in transcription. Raw transcripts work perfectly — the AI handles the messiness. Even rough notes from memory work in a pinch.

meetings action items notes decisions follow-up transcription productivity

Prompt Variants by Model

Claude Claude 4.x
FRESH APR 2026 
You are an executive assistant processing meeting content.

<meeting_content>
[PASTE TRANSCRIPT, RECORDING NOTES, OR YOUR ROUGH NOTES FROM THE MEETING]
</meeting_content>

<meeting_context>
Meeting...
You are an executive assistant processing meeting content.

<meeting_content>
[PASTE TRANSCRIPT, RECORDING NOTES, OR YOUR ROUGH NOTES FROM THE MEETING]
</meeting_content>

<meeting_context>
Meeting...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

You are an executive assistant processing meeting content.

<meeting_content>
[PASTE TRANSCRIPT, RECORDING NOTES, OR YOUR ROUGH NOTES FROM THE MEETING]
</meeting_content>

<meeting_context>
Meeting type: [team standup / client call / strategy session / project review / 1:1]
Attendees: [list names and roles]
Date: [DATE]
Purpose: [what the meeting was about]
</meeting_context>

Extract and organize:

1. **Executive summary** — 3-5 sentences capturing what happened and what was decided.

2. **Decisions made** — each decision stated clearly with who made it and any conditions.

3. **Action items** — table format: task | owner | deadline | priority (high/medium/low). If no deadline was stated, suggest one.

4. **Open questions** — things raised but not resolved, with who should answer.

5. **Key discussion points** — 3-5 bullet summaries of important discussions (not every detail).

6. **Follow-up email draft** — ready to send to attendees summarizing decisions, action items, and next steps. Professional but not stiff.

7. **Next meeting agenda suggestion** — based on open items and action deadlines.
Notes: Claude handles very long transcripts well. Paste the full Otter/Fireflies export directly. For recurring meetings, ask Claude to compare this week's notes against last week's action items to track what got done.
ChatGPT GPT-5
FRESH APR 2026 
Act as a detail-oriented executive assistant. Process this meeting content and extract everything actionable.

Meeting type:...
Act as a detail-oriented executive assistant. Process this meeting content and extract everything actionable.

Meeting type:...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Act as a detail-oriented executive assistant. Process this meeting content and extract everything actionable.

Meeting type: [standup / client call / strategy / review / 1:1]
Attendees: [names and roles]
Date: [DATE]
Purpose: [topic]

Meeting content:
[PASTE TRANSCRIPT OR NOTES]

Extract:
1. Executive summary (3-5 sentences)
2. Decisions made — who decided what, any conditions
3. Action items table: task | owner | deadline | priority
4. Open questions — unresolved items with who should answer
5. Key discussion points (3-5 bullets)
6. Follow-up email draft ready to send to attendees
7. Suggested agenda for next meeting
Notes: ChatGPT voice mode can transcribe and process in one step — record the meeting summary verbally and get structured notes back. For uploaded audio, use the file upload feature.
Gemini Gemini 3 Pro
FRESH APR 2026 
Process this meeting and extract the key outputs.

**Meeting type:** [standup / client / strategy /...
Process this meeting and extract the key outputs.

**Meeting type:** [standup / client / strategy /...

Unlock this prompt + all 74 in the library — free, updated monthly, zero spam.

Your email unlocks all 74 prompts instantly. No password, no signup — just your email. 

Process this meeting and extract the key outputs.

**Meeting type:** [standup / client / strategy / review / 1:1]
**Attendees:** [names and roles]
**Date:** [DATE]
**Purpose:** [topic]

**Content:**
[PASTE TRANSCRIPT OR NOTES]

Deliver:
1. Executive summary (3-5 sentences)
2. Decisions made with who and conditions
3. Action items: task | owner | deadline | priority
4. Open questions with who should answer
5. Key discussion points (3-5 bullets)
6. Follow-up email draft
7. Next meeting agenda suggestion
Notes: Gemini in Google Workspace can process Google Meet transcripts natively and create action items in Google Tasks or Calendar events directly. Ask it to "create calendar events for each deadline."

Process my meeting notes into structured outputs.

Process my meeting notes into structured outputs.

Meeting type: [standup / client / strategy / review / 1:1]
Attendees: [names and roles]
Date: [DATE]
Purpose: [topic]

Content:
[PASTE TRANSCRIPT OR NOTES]

Extract:
1. Summary (3-5 sentences)
2. Decisions made
3. Action items: task | owner | deadline | priority
4. Open questions
5. Key discussion points
6. Follow-up email draft
7. Next meeting agenda
Notes: Copilot in Teams processes meeting recordings automatically. If using Teams, Copilot generates notes, action items, and follow-ups without any prompt needed — but use this prompt for more structured output.
